titleStmt.title: SII 17.708: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 708. (A.R. No. 651 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north and west walls of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

The title Tribhuvanachakravarttigaḷ and the palaeography of the record point to the identity of the king with Kulōttuṅga III, who also bore the title Vīra-Rājēndra. The details of date, viz., Kaṟkaṭaka ba. 12, Rōhiṇi, Thursday point to 1184 A.D., July 5, Thursday, f.d.t. ·68, f.d.n. ·95. See No. 701 above which is dated on the same day and which records another gift by the donor of this record.

This inscription records the gift of 96 sheep by Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Paiyyūrnāḍāḻvāṉ alias [Kuvalai]yamaḻagiyāṉ Oṟṟiyaraiśaṉ (See No. 701 above) for sacrificing one sheep every Sunday in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-ppiḷḷaiyār, in Naḍuvil-malai, in Niṉṟiyūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarācentiracoḻa ṭu Āṟāvatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu tuvādaśiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu koṭṭattu naṭuvilmalai niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu Āḷḷuṭaiyār tirukkārikaraip piḷḷaiyārkku Immaṇṭalattu puḻak lottuṅkacoḻa paiyyūr nāṭāḻvāṉ Āṉa kuvalaiyamaḻakiyāṉ Oṟṟiyaraicaṉen cantirātittavarai tirunāyaṟṟukkiḻamai toṟum Oru Āṭu veṭṭak kaṭavatāka viṭṭa Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟu Āṟu .
Digital edition of SII 17.708 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
